[[File:Band01_chunk010_p002_img001.jpg|thumb|C Anbetung der Hirten]]  
[[File:Band01_chunk010_p002_img002.jpg|thumb]]  
[[File:Band01_chunk010_p002_img003.jpg|thumb]]  
[[File:Band01_chunk010_p002_img004.jpg|thumb|D Flucht nach Ägypte]]  
<!-- citation-page-top: Band01 p452 -->  
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band01 p453 -->  

== Mariä Verkündigung ==  
B Heimsuchung
